subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-07-04 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: The Blessed Beauty Himself taught and guided Haji Hashim. He had a son-in-law, Aqa Khalil-i-Dawlatabadi [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حاجی هاشم را جمال مبارک بنفس خود تبلیغ فرمودند.  دامادی داشت آقا خلیل دولت آبادی
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
